# guardicore_user_group (Resource)

Manages a user group in Akamai Guardicore Segmentation. User groups associate Active Directory orchestration groups for use in visibility policies.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "guardicore_user_group" "platform_engineers" {
  title = "Platform Engineers"

  orchestrations_groups = [
    {
      orchestration_id = "ad-orchestration-primary"
      groups = [
        "CN=Platform-Engineers,OU=Groups,DC=example,DC=com",
        "CN=Ops-OnCall,OU=Groups,DC=example,DC=com",
      ]
    },
    {
      orchestration_id = "ad-orchestration-secondary"
      groups = [
        "CN=Cloud-Operations,OU=Groups,DC=corp,DC=example",
      ]
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `orchestrations_groups` (Attributes List) List of orchestration groups to include in the user group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--orchestrations_groups))
- `title` (String) The title of the user group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the user group.

<a id="nestedatt--orchestrations_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `orchestrations_groups`

Required:

- `groups` (List of String) List of group IDs within the orchestration.
- `orchestration_id` (String) The orchestration ID.
